answer: Global investment in solar PV reached a record USD 554 billion in 2024, up 49%, surpassing fossil fuel investments. Renewable energy capacity grew by 15.1% in 2024, driven by solar. Innovations like next-generation solar panels and green hydrogen production emerged.

results.title: Global renewables investment growth slows in 2024 - IRENA
results.snippet: Global renewable energy investment increased 7.3% year-on-year in 2024 to hit USD 807 billion (EUR 693bn), marking a significant slowdown

results.title: Renewable energy capacity surged around the world in 2024
results.snippet: Global renewable energy capacity grew by 15.1% in 2024, largely driven by solar. Yet a growth rate of at least 16.6% must be maintained to reach

results.title: Global overview – Renewables 2024 – Analysis - IEA
results.snippet: Renewable energy consumption in the power, heat and transport sectors increases near 60% over 2024-2030 in our main-case forecast.

results.title: Innovations in Renewable Energy: What's New in 2024 | SmartEnergy

results.title: RENEWABLES 2024 GLOBAL STATUS REPORT - REN21
results.snippet: REN21's Renewables Global Status Report (GSR) has spotlighted ongoing developments and emerging trends that shape the future of renewables.
